normal: A few hundred log lines per day during active use
Auth errors from unauthenticated external probes are expected
Background sync jobs run nightly; slow queries there are normal
flag: Auth failures from known internal IPs — would indicate a real issue
Database connection errors — pool exhaustion has happened before
ignore: probe: unknown route — bots, not users

normal: loops/common/ is a shared package — public exports in __init__.py are intentionally general-purpose
Private helpers (underscore prefix) inside domain modules are expected and correct
flag: Public functions whose names contain domain vocabulary matching another module (e.g. 'retrospective', 'scan', 'fix') and whose only caller is that domain module

normal: Python loop coordinator delegates all LLM work to claude -p subprocesses
loops/common/ holds shared infrastructure; fix.py and scan.py are pure orchestration
flag: subprocess.run calls outside loops/common/ that should use the git() or gh() dispatcher
Missing test coverage for loop coordinator branching logic
ignore: docs/ is intentionally informal — absence of docstrings there is not a gap
prompts/ are markdown, not code — style inconsistencies there are not findings

normal: Occasional first-draft rejection followed by successful redraft is expected
Single non-convergence on a complex scan is not a pattern
flag: Same failure mode appearing across 3+ runs
Reflections mentioning missing context or ambiguous prompts repeatedly
Review rounds consistently rejecting for the same rule violation

normal: Occasional first-draft rejection followed by successful redraft is expected
Single non-convergence on a complex fix run is not a pattern
flag: Same failure mode appearing across 3+ fix runs
Implement agent producing no diff repeatedly
Review rounds consistently rejecting for the same rule violation
Reflections mentioning missing context or ambiguous prompts repeatedly
